lede: Been building web and mobile stuff since 2016. Database, API, deployment, I handle the whole thing, no hand-offs.
about1: I'm good solo or on a team, and I genuinely like figuring out the fastest, cleanest way to get something done.
about2: I love poking at new things in dev, picking up new languages for whatever's next, and dragging old systems into the modern era. I've moved POS back offices from PHP to JavaScript, swapped databases from SQL Server to PostgreSQL, and built everything from MLM platforms to fintech, ERP, and online stores.

j1b: Shipped the News Portal Center, R&D, SSO and Web Portal apps

j1d: Made the Pink Lava UI component library
